channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped Furniture blocking the path, 9th March
item.description:
Flytip furniture is blocking access to community centre

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 9th March
item.description:
Heavy littering either side of carriageway. Full length of the cycle / pedestrian pathway
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clarence Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic lights facing wrong way, 9th March
item.description:
Repeat problem. Traffic lights facing traffic coming through tunnel, facing wrong way again.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Arch 56, South Lambeth Road, Vauxhall, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - pole leaning / equipment detached from pole/facing the wrong direction

item.title: Huge fly tipping, 9th March
item.description:
Commercial items fly tipped on both sides of Carter street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lorrimore Square, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping with name and address, 9th March
item.description:
Nos cannisters flytipped including Amazon box with a name and address

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 489, Footscray Road, New Eltham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged on disabily access dropped kerb Jnc Glenfinlas Way, and Laxley Close, 9th March
item.description:
The drop down kerb on corner of Glenfinlas Way and Laxley Close and a lot damage with a hole. Please make this urgent as it a Disabily access point that if someone goes over it at certain angle they will fall out of their chair and can serious injury themselves. There has been times I've gone over it with my son's pram and my front wheel got hit a gap and back wheels has lifted if he wasn't strapped in he would have fallen out. This has been there for a long time, it was sprayed up in November thinking it was going to get fix but hasn't.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50-53, Glenfinlas Way, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish left on pavement, 9th March
item.description:
More rubbish has been left outside our house and fire escape again. Same place same problem. This time more general rubbish than fly tipped bags but this persistent problem happens too often.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shepherdess Walk, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road subsidence, 9th March
item.description:
24 Stradella Road- I reported this problem last year. The road level has dropped making it impossible to use the drive without damaging the car. The road seems to have deteriorated further this winter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Stradella Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Sunday, 9th March
item.description:
Dumped residential tenant

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hardman Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish including food, 9th March
item.description:
Rubbish including food waste in usual spot

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Palmerston Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Obstruction to pavement, 9th March
item.description:
This barrier been here over a month and now the cone is in road and the yellow barrier across pavement causing obstruction to both vehicles and pedestrians. Elderly residents or children could trip over this or in fact any resident especially at nighttime

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 123, Bladindon Drive, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More rubbish in this hotspot, 9th March
item.description:
People keep fly tipping here. I've reported this a number of times and the council keep clearing it but people are just continuing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 393, Abbey Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wood, 9th March
item.description:
Wood

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellefields Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More rubbish in this hotspot, 9th March
item.description:
People keep fly tipping here. I've reported this a number of times and the council keep clearing it but people are just continuing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 393, Abbey Road, West Heath, Greater London

item.title: Hedge blocking pavement, 9th March
item.description:
Been like this for months and getting worse

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Leesons Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car Crash. Wall destroyed, 9th March
item.description:
A car has obviously crashed over night and there is extensive damage to the fence and spilling all over the pavement into the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dulwich Wood Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Recurring littering, 9th March
item.description:
This has been happening weekly and has become a persistent problem. The same vehicle regularly stops by this green space and leaves litter behind in the public area after eating. I have attached photos of the rubbish. This appears to be an ongoing issue and would benefit from investigation.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mottingham Lane, Mottingham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping in alley way, 9th March
item.description:
Someone has left a large bag of rubbish and some old furniture in the alleyway.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Townley Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on Greenland Dock underpass, 9th March
item.description:
Graffiti on the Tesco side of the underpass

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Redriff Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive Litter the waste bin at the junction of Harry Zeital Way and Mount Pleasant Hill has overflowed and one bag pulled into the road and has burst., 9th March
item.description:
Excessive Litter the waste bin at the junction of Harry Zeital Way and Mount Pleasant Hill has overflowed and one bag pulled into the road and has burst.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mount Pleasant Hill, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
